name: Qalam Homra
overview: When Ward, a Damascus-based screenwriter, is arrested and thrown into a Syrian regime detention cell, she finds herself narrating the lives of her own fictional characters from behind bars. Set against the devastating backdrop of the Syrian crisis, this bold and deeply human drama explores love, identity, and survival across five turbulent years — painting a raw, panoramic portrait of a middle-class society caught between the world it once knew and the wreckage of war.
